title: × Serapicamptis ducoroniae
taxonomy: × Serapicamptis ducoroniae is a hybrid plant classified under the family Orchidaceae. It is believed to be a cross between the orchid species Serapias and Campanula. Specifically, its classification can be further broken down into the genus × Serapicamptis, which is a hybrid of the genera Serapias and Campanula. The exact classification of × Serapicamptis ducoroniae may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the orchid family. The classification of × Serapicamptis ducoroniae reflects its unique genetic makeup and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
